# openai_project_user_roles (Data Source)

List project-level roles for a user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_project_user_roles" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
  user_id    = "user_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id
- `user_id` (String) user id

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `roles` (Attributes List) Role assignments returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) description
- `id` (String) id
- `name` (String) name
- `permissions` (List of String) permissions
- `predefined_role` (Boolean) predefined role
- `resource_type` (String) resource type
